abstract.text: This class has observable states and persistent settings
for the core keyboard functionality.

inlineContent.text: This class syncs with
to
keep up to date. It’s extensively used in the library to
make state-based decisions, and automatically update the
whenever the context changes.
You can use
to get and set the current locale,
which also affects the keyboard primary language.
You can use
to define which locales that you
want to enable for the keyboard. This list is used until
you add any locales to
which then takes precedene over
. You can use
to resolve the valid, underlying list.
If
has multiple locales, you can loop
through the collection with
This class also has observable auto-persisted
that can be used to configure the behavior and presented
to users in e.g. a settings screen.
KeyboardKit set up an instance of this class and injects
it as an environment value when you set up your main app
and keyboard, as shown in
